name: Webinar Funnel (Live / Perfect Webinar)
origin: The flagship Brunson selling event. Drives traffic to a registration page; registrants get an indoctrination sequence then attend a live 60-90 minute event. The Perfect Webinar script is the core presentation framework.

whenToUse.summary: Use to sell a mid-to-high-ticket offer ($297-$3,000+) to a warm/semi-warm audience via a live teaching presentation that closes with The Stack and a cart-close deadline.
goals: Sell a course/program/service through a live teaching-then-pitch presentation
Break the prospect's 3 core false beliefs before the offer
Use live scarcity (cart closes when the replay window ends) to drive purchases
signals: Offer needs explaining/teaching before the prospect will buy
Client has expertise and is willing to present live
Price point too high for a simple order page
Audience needs belief-shifting (new opportunity, new mechanism)
antiSignals: Client cannot/will not present (use AutoWebinar once a winning live one exists)
Sub-$100 impulse product (use 5-Minute Perfect Webinar or VSL)

pageStructure.purpose: Convert traffic into registrants with curiosity, not the full pitch.
keyElements: Curiosity 'Big Promise' headline naming the new opportunity
3 fascination bullets that tease the 3 secrets
Opt-in form (name + email, optional phone for SMS reminders)

pageStructure.purpose: Lock in attendance and pre-frame belief so they show up primed to buy.
keyElements: What to bring / why attend live (live-only bonus tease)

pageStructure.purpose: Host the live Perfect Webinar and present the offer.
keyElements: Perfect Webinar flow: Intro hook → 3 Secrets → The Stack → Close
Buy button revealed during The Stack with cart-open countdown

pageStructure.purpose: Recover no-shows and undecideds with a time-boxed replay and a hard cart-close.

scripts: Presentation = Perfect Webinar (Intro/Hook 'The One Thing' → Secret 1 (vehicle) → Secret 2 (internal) → Secret 3 (external) → The Stack → Close with trial + scarcity)
Registration headline + bullets + replay urgency = Copywriting Secrets
Replay/order page stack recap = Star/Story/Solution reinforcement
copyFramework.notes: The 3 Secrets each break one false-belief pattern (vehicle, internal, external). The Stack is the close. Live scarcity + replay deadline is what converts the fence-sitters.

skill44Widgets: Order form widget with order bump
automations: Attended vs no-show tag → segmented replay sequence
Cart-close countdown drives 3 Closes follow-up (emotion → logic → fear)
Purchase → fulfillment + remove from sales sequence
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the 4 pages and embeds the webinar player; Skill 44 generates the opt-in form, the reminder widgets, the order form + bump, and the cart-close countdown timer that powers the urgency close.
